tabs.title: experience
tabs.subtitle: Where I've worked and what I've built

description: working on early engineering/product, a lot of 0→1. building a voice-first intelligence layer for the built world, starting with data capture.

worked on a backend/api team supporting the etsy mobile app. shipped api services that enabled a new, really cool user hub with improved access to order tracking, reviwing, and gift card management. also built out some dev tooling for api engineers across the company.
fun fact: i lived a 10 min walk from the brooklyn prison where diddy and nicholas maduro were held
the summer after my first year of school, i built and internally launched a reporting platform to help kroger monitor the freshness of fruits, vegetables, meat etc. across their supply chain(s).
didn't write a lot of code (unless you're counting dax), but i learned how to get shit done in corporate america.
spent most of my free time freshman year working as an engineer at a prop-tech startup building tools for the title industry.
this was my first experience getting off localhost and building something for more than just myself. figured out what it was like to ship to prod (and also break it sometimes).
learned a lot in (but mostly outside) the classroom and met a lot of really cool people. saw the buckeyes win the national championship. graduating a year early to start building full time.

items.name: Casey
items.blurb: helping educators create case studies based on real experiences
description: An AI-powered case study generator for instructors that dynamically builds teaching materials based on real-world input from industry professionals.

items.name: OmniDoc
description: A voice-to-voice AI agent for healthcare intake that uses Whisper and GPT-4o to generate medical summaries for doctors in real time.

items.name: Postr
description: A Pokémon-themed productivity app that gamifies focus sessions through a FastAPI backend and React frontend.

items.name: BuckeyeClaw
items.blurb: sms based agent providing one interface for all ohio state student needs
description: A Pokémon-themed productivity app that gamifies focus sessions through a FastAPI backend and React frontend.
